title: Will the manga clear up concurrency
display_title: Will the manga clear up concurrency
wikitext:
[]: Will the manga clear up concurrency?             Quote Post by Number 44 » Mon Apr 04, 2011 7:54 pm I remember hearing once that two events are not enough to establish a pattern. I don't remember where I heard that but it stuck with me. Concurrency has been a long standing topic concerning the EoTV versus EoE. I personally have always believed the two endings are the same, but have to admit it is open to interpretation. I was wondering if the Neon Genesis Evangelion manga's ending will make a difference in this long standing debate. The manga will count as a third ending, so can it be used as a third point of reference? Should it be accepted as canon?

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Apr 04, 2011 7:57 pm The manga is only canon to the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Mon Apr 04, 2011 7:57 pm ^This.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Mon Apr 04, 2011 8:34 pm It's pointless to speculate since none of us will live to see the day.

[]: Re: Will the manga clear up concurrency?             Quote Post by symbv » Mon Apr 04, 2011 9:49 pm Number 44 wrote: I was wondering if the Neon Genesis Evangelion manga's ending will make a difference in this long standing debate. The manga will count as a third ending, so can it be used as a third point of reference? Should it be accepted as canon?

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Mon Apr 04, 2011 11:47 pm Rodeo wrote: It's pointless to speculate since none of us will live to see the day.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Apr 04, 2011 11:50 pm cd603 wrote: umm...can you say "dark much"??

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Mon Apr 04, 2011 11:59 pm TehDonutKing wrote: You think that's dark? I drew a comic strip about the devil running a gas station and charging souls for premium in 2018. And it was for school.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Tue Apr 05, 2011 3:27 pm This should help clear things up (maybe): [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Theory_and_Analysis:What_Is_Canon%3F#Tier_4:_The_Manga[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Apr 05, 2011 11:27 pm Keep in mind that the Tiers of Canonicity is only a fan-made model to help prioritize things from different sources to avoid contradictions. It's not anything official and some people around here don't adhere to it. But it's a tool that helps when there's multiple people discussing something that involves different sources, otherwise nobody's going to be on the same page.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Wed Apr 06, 2011 7:35 am cd603 wrote: umm...can you say "dark much"??
